summary_one_line: The ICC profile colorspace signature field at offset 0x10-0x13 must equal the FOURCC 'Luv ' to take the blocked case arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte colorspace signature at input offset 0x10-0x13 must spell the FOURCC 'Luv ' (4c 75 76 20). The switch in cmsChannelsOfColorSpace dispatches on this value, and only cmsSigLuvData (along with the other 3-channel sister arms) reaches the blocked case at cmspcs.c:890.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds carry bytes 4c 75 76 20 ('Luv ') at offset 0x10-0x13; the byte-diff section shows offsets 0x10/0x11/0x12 concentrated on 4c(L)/75(u)/76(v) for the winner. This exact-literal match drives the switch to the cmsSigLuvData arm.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All five loser-blocking seeds carry 52 47 42 20 ('RGB ') at offset 0x10-0x13, dispatching to the cmsSigRgbData arm instead; value_profile never substitutes the exact 'Luv ' FOURCC, so it stays blocked at the true side (9/10 trials).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which logs the comparand of the switch-dispatch CMP (the cmsSigLuvData literal 0x4C757620) and splices it directly into the input at the offset where the colorspace signature is read. value_profile only has the CMP_MAP Hamming-distance gradient, which cannot place an exact 4-byte literal across a near-uniform-distance jump-table dispatch, so it cannot resolve the exact FOURCC match.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the cmsSigLuvData case arm of a switch on the colorspace signature in cmsChannelsOfColorSpace.
The blocked side is the true branch of the switch dispatch.
The byte-diff section flags offsets 0x10/0x11/0x12 as DIFFER with W concentrated on L/u/v and L on R/G/B.
value_profile_cmplog includes the I2SRandReplace mutator that value_profile lacks.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only havoc + token stack plus CMP_MAP gradient.
value_profile_cmplog resolved 10/10 trials while value_profile resolved only 1/10, the decisive I2S pair.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2291 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed d82c60bf4a9baa76` and observed one I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 4 of the 5-level ancestor chain, the ParentInfo-only signature of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A value_profile (no-I2S) trial resolving the cmsSigLuvData branch by placing the exact 4-byte 'Luv ' FOURCC at the signature offset purely via CMP_MAP gradient / havoc, with no I2S-floor dash row in its lineage.

weakest_evidence_point: The dispatch is a wide switch where the cmsSigLabData/cmsSigRgbData sister arms share the blocked case-line coverage, so attribution to the exact 'Luv ' literal rather than any of the 3-channel sister FOURCCs is partly inferred from the seed bytes rather than isolated.
